reviews.review_description: But needs weapon collision improvement when attacking with swords,guns etc. Although the  graphics  are cool but still can  use some improvements as well, along with the visuals and environments. If you can developers add modifiers for the difficulty or a option to adjust the difficulty settings.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! We're still developing the game, so any input is appreciated - by the way, if you want to join us on our Discord server (https://discord.com/invite/S2fqJYGGDg) and give more feedback you're more than welcome! :-)

reviews.review_description: Despite its action-packed nature, the game manages to be surprisingly relaxing. i got hooked for a while trying to get the higher score and stay top of the leaderboard. After a while since you get better, games start to take longer so i don't advise it for people that don't have too much time and need a quick game during breaks but overall its a really fun game

I know it's early access and I see that the game has an update almost each week, that's a good way to keep the community entertained. I found it pretty good to play and even if it's not my favourite genre I was surprised to find myself playing it for many hours. I completely lost track of the time and that's something I would never imagined ahah there are some improvements that could be done but I read on their discord that the team is pretty active and adding tons of stuff periodically, that's why I gave so many stars, because it's promising!

The game is fun to play and has some interesting mechanics (use of cards in game, upgradable weapons, different gameplay modes, competitive leaderboards ecc). Excellent, considering that it is still under development!
